name: alternate-sdk
description: Official SDK for M Framework, providing a comprehensive set of tools and utilities for seamless integration and development with the M Framework ecosystem.

scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && nuxt dev playground
scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxt prepare playground
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
